prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年重庆物理类最低位次分别约18560名→19547名→29897名→25204名→9740名，整体波动极大。2023年因断档跌至近3万名，2024年回升至25204名，2025年大幅跃升至9740名，创历史最好水平，存在明显的大小年效应；2021–2025年重庆物理类招生计划分别为66人、66人、61人、62人、60人，总体呈小幅缩减趋势。2026年计划57人，较2025年60人缩招5%，竞争略有加剧，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第82名→2022年第83名→2023年第83名→2024年第83名→2025年第79名→2026年第80名，排名稳定在80名左右，属中上水平211；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛、开除学术不端学生），可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响。抖音热度排名第77位，综合热度约31.8万，评价为一般，短视频曝光度不高。2025年投档异常信号显示热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考，存在报考信心波动；第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A级学科。计算机、电子信息、电气等工科专业虽未单独获评A级，但依托学校工科底蕴，在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度从2023年高热推荐（82.69）降至2024年推荐（67.8），呈明显降温趋势；电子信息/通信维持高热推荐（76.86）；电气工程及其自动化升至高热推荐（74.28）。重庆物理类考生数2021年98954→2025年139478持续增长，2026年总考生约20.9万，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算约13.69万人，较2025年13.95万人略降，竞争压力略有缓解。；合肥工业大学位于安徽省，非重庆本地高校。该校在重庆招生占比极小（约0.6%），历年重庆招生人数稳定在34人左右，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次9740为历史最好水平（存在回调压力）、2026年缩招5%、声誉偏负面（抑制报考热情）、考生总数略降（竞争略减）等多重因素。预计2026年最低位次约9648名，区间9148–10148名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category in Chongqing were approximately 18560 → 19547 → 29897 → 25204 → 9740, showing significant volatility. In 2023, due to a gap, it dropped to nearly 30,000, recovered to 25204 in 2024, and surged to 9740 in 2025, a historical best, indicating a clear odd-even year effect. Enrollment plans for Physics Category in Chongqing from 2021 to 2025 were 66, 66, 61, 62, and 60 respectively, showing a slight decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 57, a 5% reduction from 2025's 60, slightly intensifying competition but with limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 2021: 82nd, 2022: 83rd, 2023: 83rd, 2024: 83rd, 2025: 79th, 2026: 80th, stable around 80th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance exam cycle is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing others' works for competitions, expelling students for academic dishonesty), which may negatively impact application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 77th, with a comprehensive heat of about 318,000, rated as average, with low short video exposure. Abnormal signals in 2025 admissions show a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors with no applicants, indicating fluctuating application confidence. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only A-level discipline at the university. Although majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering did not individually receive A-level ratings, they are highly recognized in the industry due to the university's engineering foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science popularity dropped from high recommendation (82.69) in 2023 to recommendation (67.8) in 2024, showing a clear cooling trend. Electronic Information/Communication maintains high recommendation (76.86). Electrical Engineering and Automation rose to high recommendation (74.28). The number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 estimated at about 209,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, this is approximately 136,900, slightly lower than 2025's 139,500, easing competition slightly. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province, not a local university in Chongqing. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is very small (about 0.6%), with historical enrollment stable at around 34 students, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors: the 2025 ranking of 9740 is a historical best (with potential for correction), a 5% enrollment reduction in 2026, negative reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm), and a slight decrease in total examinees (slightly reducing competition). The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 9648, with a range of 9148 to 10148.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 9648, range 9148–10148. Candidates with rankings above the lower bound (9148) can focus on Tier 1 majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information. Those around the middle of the range (about 9600) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Automation and Vehicle Engineering, with some Tier 1 as reach. Candidates near the upper bound (10148) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors. The university's Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, so related majors (Big Data Management and Application) are worth attention.
